name: I-Needle Chest Decompression (NCD)
description: Ukukhululwa okuphuthumayo kwe-tension pneumothorax ngokufaka inaliti endaweni yesibili ye-intercostal. Ukungenelela okusindisa ukuphila.
steps: Khomba i-tension pneumothorax: imisindo yokuphefumula engekho ohlangothini oluthintekile, ukuchezuka koqhoqhoqho (sekwephuzile), ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula, i-hypotension, i-JVD.
Thola indawo yesi-2 ye-intercostal, umugqa we-midclavicular (okunye: 4th/5th ICS, umugqa we-axillary wangaphambili).
Faka i-14g, 3.25-inch inaliti-catheter perpendicular odongeni lwesifuba, ngenhla nje OKUPHEZULU kombambo wesi-3 (ugwema inqwaba ye-neurovascular).
Dlulela kuze kube yilapho kuzwakala umsindo noma umsindo ozwakalayo.
Susa inaliti bese ushiya i-catheter endaweni.
Lalela ukuthuthukisa imisindo yokuphefumula nomzamo wokuphefumula.
Vikela ihabhu le-catheter. UNGAQINISI noma umboze indawo evulekile.
Phinda uhlole njalo emizuzwini emi-5 -- i-catheter ingagiqa noma ihlule, idinge ukucindezelwa okuphindaphindiwe.
warnings: Sebenzisa inaliti engu-3.25-intshi -- i-angiocatheter ejwayelekile engu-14g (1.5in) ivamise ukwehluleka ezigulini zempi ngenxa yezivikelo zomzimba kanye nemisipha.
I-NCD yamazwe amabili ingase idingeke uma kungaqinisekiswa ukuthi yiluphi uhlangothi oluthintekile futhi isiguli siboshwe ngasikhathi sinye.
Ungabeki ohlangothini olulodwa nokumunca inxeba esifubeni ngaphandle kokuvala isilonda kuqala.

pediatric.note: Sebenzisa inaliti yobukhulu obufanele (iziguli ezincane, i-1.5-2in ingase yanele). Sebenzisa indlela yesi-2 ye-ICS MCL. Ukuqashelwa kophawu lomhlaba kunzima kakhulu -- sebenzisa ukuqaphela.
